calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-02-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Petitioner William James Ammons, III present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Bly Tau-Min.
Decree signed in open court.
